rules.name: Lane Width Range - Basic Freeway
rules.description: Lane width must be between 10 and 12 feet
rules.error_message: Lane width must be between 10 and 12 feet per HCM

rules.name: Right Lateral Clearance Range
rules.description: Right lateral clearance must be between 0 and 6 feet
rules.error_message: Right lateral clearance must be 0-6 feet

rules.name: Left Lateral Clearance Range
rules.description: Left lateral clearance must be between 0 and 6 feet
rules.error_message: Left lateral clearance must be 0-6 feet

rules.name: PHF Range - Basic Freeway
rules.description: Peak hour factor must be between 0.80 and 1.0
rules.error_message: PHF must be between 0.80 and 1.0

rules.name: PHF Typical Warning
rules.description: PHF typically ranges from 0.85 to 0.95
rules.error_message: PHF outside typical range (0.85-0.95)

rules.name: Base FFS Range
rules.description: Base free-flow speed range
rules.error_message: Base FFS must be between 50 and 75.4 mph

rules.name: Speed Limit Range - Basic Freeway
rules.description: Speed limit range for basic freeways
rules.error_message: Speed limit must be between 55 and 75 mph

rules.name: Truck Percentage Range
rules.description: Truck percentage must be between 0 and 25%
rules.error_message: Truck percentage must be between 0 and 25%

rules.name: Lane Width Range - Two Lane Highway
rules.description: Lane width must be between 9 and 12 feet
rules.error_message: Lane width must be between 9 and 12 feet

rules.name: Shoulder Width Range
rules.description: Shoulder width must be between 0 and 10 feet
rules.error_message: Shoulder width must be between 0 and 10 feet

rules.name: Grade Range - Two Lane Highway
rules.description: Grade must be between -6% and 6%
rules.error_message: Grade must be between -6% and 6%

rules.name: Speed Limit Range - Two Lane Highway
rules.description: Speed limit for two-lane highways
rules.error_message: Speed limit must be between 45 and 60 mph

rules.name: Heavy Vehicle Percentage Range
rules.description: Heavy vehicle percentage range
rules.error_message: Heavy vehicle percentage must be between 0 and 50%

rules.name: Superelevation Range
rules.description: Superelevation must be between 0% and 12%
rules.error_message: Superelevation must be between 0% and 12%

rules.name: Passing Type Validation
rules.description: Passing type must be 0 (Constrained), 1 (Zone), or 2 (Lane)
rules.error_message: Invalid passing type

rules.name: Vertical Class Validation
rules.description: Vertical class must be 1-5
rules.error_message: Vertical class must be between 1 and 5

rules.name: Horizontal Class Validation
rules.description: Horizontal class must be 0-5
rules.error_message: Horizontal class must be between 0 and 5

rules.name: Base FFS vs Speed Limit
rules.description: Base free-flow speed should typically exceed posted speed limit by at least 5 mph
rules.error_message: Base FFS should be at least 5 mph above posted speed limit

rules.name: Lane Width Plus Right Clearance
rules.description: Combined lane width and right lateral clearance should provide adequate clear zone
rules.error_message: Lane width plus right clearance should be at least 13 ft

rules.name: Ramp Density vs Lane Count
rules.description: High ramp density requires adequate lane count to maintain operations
rules.error_message: High ramp density (>2/mi) requires at least 3 lanes

rules.name: Lane Width Plus Shoulder
rules.description: Combined lane and shoulder width should provide adequate roadway width
rules.error_message: Lane width plus shoulder width should be at least 14 ft

rules.name: Grade vs Vertical Class Consistency
rules.formula: (vertical_class <= 2 and abs(grade) <= 3) or (vertical_class >= 3 and abs(grade) > 2) or vertical_class == 3
rules.description: Vertical class should be consistent with grade steepness
rules.error_message: Vertical class may not match reported grade

rules.name: Design Radius Range - Two Lane Highway
rules.description: Design radius must be within feasible range
rules.error_message: Design radius must be between 100 and 10000 feet

rules.name: Speed-Curvature Compatibility - 45 mph
rules.description: Minimum radius for 45 mph design speed (Green Book Table 3-7)
rules.error_message: Design radius too small for speed limit >= 45 mph (min 560 ft)

rules.name: Speed-Curvature Compatibility - 50 mph
rules.description: Minimum radius for 50 mph design speed (Green Book Table 3-7)
rules.error_message: Design radius too small for speed limit >= 50 mph (min 710 ft)

rules.name: Speed-Curvature Compatibility - 55 mph
rules.description: Minimum radius for 55 mph design speed (Green Book Table 3-7)
rules.error_message: Design radius too small for speed limit >= 55 mph (min 835 ft)

rules.name: Speed-Curvature Compatibility - 60 mph
rules.description: Minimum radius for 60 mph design speed (Green Book Table 3-7)
rules.error_message: Design radius too small for speed limit >= 60 mph (min 1000 ft)

rules.name: Design Radius vs Horizontal Class - Class 0
rules.description: Tangent alignment (R >= 2550 ft)
rules.error_message: Design radius >= 2550 ft should be class 0 (tangent)

rules.name: Design Radius vs Horizontal Class - Class 1
rules.description: Gentle curve (1350 <= R < 2550 ft)
rules.error_message: Design radius 1350-2550 ft should be class 1 (gentle)

rules.name: Design Radius vs Horizontal Class - Class 2-5
rules.description: Moderate to severe curve classification
rules.error_message: Design radius should match horizontal class

rules.name: Shoulder Width Range - Basic Freeway
rules.description: Shoulder width must be between 4 and 12 feet per Green Book
rules.error_message: Shoulder width must be between 4 and 12 feet

rules.name: Horizontal Class Validation - Basic Freeway
rules.description: Horizontal class must be 0-5
rules.error_message: Horizontal class must be between 0 and 5

rules.name: Design Radius Range - Basic Freeway
rules.description: Design radius range for freeway curves
rules.error_message: Design radius must be between 300 and 10000 feet

rules.name: Horizontal Class 0 - Tangent
rules.description: Tangent/near-tangent alignment (R >= 2550 ft)
rules.error_message: Design radius >= 2550 ft should be class 0 (tangent)

rules.name: Horizontal Class 1 - Gentle
rules.description: Gentle curve alignment (1350 <= R < 2550 ft)
rules.error_message: Design radius 1350-2550 ft should be class 1 (gentle)

rules.name: Horizontal Class 2 - Moderate
rules.description: Moderate curve alignment (750 <= R < 1350 ft)
rules.error_message: Design radius 750-1350 ft should be class 2 (moderate)

rules.name: Horizontal Class 3 - Sharp
rules.description: Sharp curve alignment (450 <= R < 750 ft)
rules.error_message: Design radius 450-750 ft should be class 3 (sharp)

rules.name: Horizontal Class 4 - Very Sharp
rules.description: Very sharp curve alignment (300 <= R < 450 ft)
rules.error_message: Design radius 300-450 ft should be class 4 (very sharp)

rules.name: Horizontal Class 5 - Severe
rules.description: Severe curve alignment (R < 300 ft)
rules.error_message: Design radius < 300 ft should be class 5 (severe)

rules.name: Lane Width Plus Shoulder
rules.description: Combined lane and shoulder width should provide adequate roadway width
rules.error_message: Lane width plus shoulder width should be at least 14 ft

rules.name: Lane Width Range - Multilane Highway
rules.description: Lane width must be between 10 and 12 feet
rules.error_message: Lane width must be between 10 and 12 feet

rules.name: Shoulder Width Range - Multilane Highway
rules.description: Shoulder width must be between 4 and 10 feet per Green Book
rules.error_message: Shoulder width must be between 4 and 10 feet

rules.name: Right Lateral Clearance - Multilane Highway
rules.description: Right lateral clearance must be between 0 and 6 feet
rules.error_message: Right lateral clearance must be 0-6 feet

rules.name: Left Lateral Clearance - Multilane Highway
rules.description: Left lateral clearance must be between 0 and 6 feet
rules.error_message: Left lateral clearance must be 0-6 feet

rules.name: Median Width Range
rules.description: Median width typical range
rules.error_message: Median width outside typical range (4-60 ft)

rules.name: Valid Median Type
rules.description: Median type must be valid category
rules.error_message: Invalid median type

rules.name: Horizontal Class Validation - Multilane Highway
rules.description: Horizontal class must be 0-5
rules.error_message: Horizontal class must be between 0 and 5

rules.name: Free Flow Speed Range - Multilane Highway
rules.description: Free flow speed range for multilane highways
rules.error_message: FFS must be between 45 and 70 mph

rules.name: PHF Range - Multilane Highway
rules.description: Peak hour factor must be between 0.80 and 1.0
rules.error_message: PHF must be between 0.80 and 1.0

rules.name: Lane Width Plus Shoulder - Multilane
rules.description: Combined lane and shoulder width should provide adequate roadway width
rules.error_message: Lane width plus shoulder width should be at least 14 ft
